title: LDTC: Loop‑Dominance (NC1/SC1) verification harness
description: LDTC is a single‑machine verification harness that implements the Loop‑Dominance (NC1/SC1) pipeline from the accompanying paper. It computes Lloop and Lexchange at fixed Δt using VAR‑Granger and Kraskov k‑NN MI, performs deterministic C/Ex partitioning with hysteresis, enforces guardrails/attestation (LREG, Δt governance, audit chain), and provides an Ω perturbation battery (power sag, ingress flood, command conflict, exogenous subsidy) with a CLI and reporting/figures.
